bird.name: Marañón sparrow
bird.summary: The Maranon sparrow (Arremon nigriceps) is a Near Threatened species of passerine bird in the New World sparrow family Passerellidae. It is…

locations.name: 馬拉尼翁河
locations.summary: 馬拉尼翁河（西班牙語：Río Marañón）發源自秘魯利馬東北160公里，向西北方向流經安第斯山脈河谷到達南緯5度36分，然後轉往東北方向橫越安第斯山脈，與烏卡亞利河（Ucayali River）匯流，成為亞馬遜河。

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

relations.subject: Marañón sparrow
relations.evidence: The Maranon sparrow is found in the upper watershed of the Marañón River

relations.subject: Marañón sparrow
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits somewhat dry tropical deciduous forest and gallery forest; locally it occurs in more humid evergreen forest

relations.subject: Marañón sparrow

relations.subject: Marañón sparrow
relations.evidence: "Due to the species' preference for forests, it is vulnerable to the loss and degradation of habitat, mainly through logging and expansion of agriculture and livestock pastures
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
